package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for string_concatenation_for_path_join: `dir + "/" + file` or manual path assembly via `+` concatenation
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario646Negative(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return strings.Contains(haystack, needle)
}
